official_pick_rules.note: Lab Score is setup quality. It is not win probability. Official picks require both strong win probability and strong setup quality.

summary: 1 official moneyline pick cleared the stricter model-probability and Lab Score gates. 1 value-watch setup had good price math but did not clear official-pick probability rules.

lab_score_breakdown.note: Lab Score grades setup quality. It is not win probability.

games.read: Detroit Tigers is an official moneyline pick because it clears both gates: 80.8% model win probability and 83/100 Lab Score. LyDia projects 80.8% against a 53.9% no-vig market number, a 26.9% model edge at -123. Detroit Tigers owns the starting pitcher edge by 16 points. Bullpen read: Neutral.

pick_team.score_reason: Score 43/100 (Normal). Formula: 45 + ((7.7 - 9) x 3.5) + ((3.7 - 3) x 4) + (0 x 6). Last game bullpen IP: 3.7. Three-day bullpen IP: 7.7. Back-to-back arms: 0. Relievers used: 3 last game, 6 over three days. Context only, not score points.
pick_team.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6)
